_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the study planner. Read by the P620 scripts (scripts/lib.sh → render-context.js at public/curriculum.json) AND by the web app (fetched at /curriculum.json). Track structure + skills live here; live progress (per-track month, skill coverage status) lives in config/status.json and the D1 skill_coverage table. Edit months/skills here, edit current positions in config/status.json.

student.name: Nevyn Duarte
student.background: BS Mathematics (UT Austin), MS Data Science CU Boulder (GPA 3.84). Co-Founder/CTO Bridges AI. Ex-quantitative equity researcher (M Science / Jefferies). Strong Python, RAG systems, LLM workflows, agentic systems.
student.commitment: 10 hours/day, 12-month elite curriculum across 4 parallel tracks

roles.name: D.E. Shaw — Applied AI Engineer
roles.note: Production AI systems + ML engineering rigor.

roles.name: D.E. Shaw — Alternative Data Analyst
roles.note: Alt-data sourcing, signal research, statistical rigor.

ai-eng.name: AI Engineering
ai-eng.summary: From-scratch implementations: math → autograd → transformers → LLMs → RAG/agents → CUDA → alignment → distributed inference.

months.title: Math Foundations & Python Mastery
months.focus: Linear algebra, probability, optimization, information theory. NumPy from scratch. Autograd engine. Cap CNN history to 10 hrs.

months.title: Classical ML — Theory to Production
months.focus: Every classical algorithm from scratch. MLflow tracking. Ship something deployed by week 8.

months.title: Deep Learning — Neural Nets to CNNs
months.focus: Autograd extended, ResNet from scratch, production image API. Cap CNN architecture history at 10 hrs total.

months.title: Sequence Models & the Transformer
months.focus: LSTM→attention→full Transformer from scratch. GPT with KV cache. BPE tokenizer. Reproduce paper BLEU within 2 points.

months.title: LLMs — Pre-training to Fine-tuning
months.focus: Pre-training pipeline, LoRA/QLoRA from scratch, vLLM inference server. Chinchilla laws. 125M model trained end-to-end.

months.title: AI Engineering — RAG, Agents, Production
months.focus: Production RAG platform, coding agent, MCP multi-agent system, RAGAS evaluation, full observability stack.

months.title: Systems — GPUs, CUDA, Distributed AI
months.focus: CUDA kernels, FlashAttention tiling, FSDP distributed training, Kubernetes ML platform.

months.title: Reinforcement Learning & Alignment
months.focus: PPO/DQN from scratch, RLHF pipeline (SFT→RM→PPO), DPO comparison, GRPO reasoning training.

months.title: Data Engineering for AI & AI Products
months.focus: Kafka, Flink, Spark, dbt. Real-time feature platform feeding live models.

months.title: Frontier — Multimodal & Research
months.focus: ViT, CLIP, diffusion, Mamba. Multimodal RAG. Paper reproduction. Research preprint drafted.

months.title: Leadership, Product & AI Startup
months.focus: AI product with real users. Open-source PR merged. Blog posts. Conference talk proposal.

months.title: Elite Synthesis — Launch & Specialization
months.focus: Distributed inference system 1000 QPS. Personal AI OS. Research preprint submitted.

ml-eng.name: ML Engineering
ml-eng.summary: The production ML lifecycle: clean code → pipelines → serving → CI/CD → monitoring → orchestration → platform. What turns a model into a system.

months.title: Engineering Foundations
months.focus: Pytest, type hints, packaging, pre-commit, clean repo structure. Treat every project as production code.

months.title: Containers & Reproducibility
months.focus: Docker, multi-stage builds, devcontainers, dependency pinning, reproducible environments.

months.title: Data Pipelines & Validation
months.focus: ETL, Great Expectations / Pandera data contracts, feature store basics, schema validation.

months.title: Experiment Tracking & Registry
months.focus: MLflow / W&B tracking, model registry, reproducible runs, artifact versioning.

months.title: Model Serving
months.focus: FastAPI inference service, batch vs online, ONNX/TorchServe, load testing, latency budgets.

months.title: CI/CD for ML
months.focus: GitHub Actions pipelines, automated tests for models, canary/blue-green deploys, rollback.

months.title: Monitoring & Drift
months.focus: Prometheus/Grafana, data & concept drift detection, alerting, SLO dashboards.

months.title: Orchestration & Retraining
months.focus: Airflow/Dagster/Prefect DAGs, scheduled retraining, backfills, idempotent jobs.

months.title: Scalable & Cheap Inference
months.focus: vLLM/TGI, autoscaling, GPU scheduling, quantization, caching, cost-per-request.

months.title: Internal ML Platform
months.focus: Self-serve tooling, templates, golden paths, abstractions other engineers reuse.

months.title: Reliability & On-call
months.focus: SLOs/SLIs, incident response, runbooks, chaos testing an ML service.

months.title: ML Systems Capstone
months.focus: End-to-end production ML system with monitoring, CI/CD, autoscaling, documented SLOs.

data-sci.name: Data Science
data-sci.summary: Statistical rigor and inference: hypothesis testing → experiments → causal inference → modeling → Bayesian → communication. The analyst muscle for the D.E. Shaw / Woodline data roles.

months.title: Statistical Inference
months.focus: Distributions, estimation, CLT, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, bootstrap — from first principles.

months.title: Experiment Design & A/B Testing
months.focus: Power analysis, sample sizing, multiple testing, sequential tests, common A/B pitfalls.

months.title: Causal Inference
months.focus: DAGs, confounding, diff-in-diff, instrumental variables, propensity scores, regression discontinuity.

months.title: Regression & GLMs
months.focus: Linear/logistic/Poisson regression, diagnostics, regularization, interpretation, assumptions.

months.title: Time Series Forecasting
months.focus: ARIMA, state-space, exponential smoothing, backtesting forecasts, evaluation (MASE).

months.title: Feature Engineering & Leakage
months.focus: Encoding, scaling, target leakage avoidance, feature selection, robust cross-validation.

months.title: Predictive Modeling & Evaluation
months.focus: Tree ensembles, calibration, metric selection, threshold tuning, error analysis.

months.title: Bayesian Methods
months.focus: PyMC, priors, hierarchical models, MCMC diagnostics, posterior predictive checks.

months.title: Data Viz & Storytelling
months.focus: Effective charts, dashboards, narrative structure, avoiding misleading viz.

months.title: Text & Embedding Analytics
months.focus: Embeddings for analytics, topic modeling, sentiment, applying NLP to tabular+text problems.

months.title: Decision Science & Communication
months.focus: Stakeholder decks, decision frameworks, translating analysis into business action.

months.title: End-to-End DS Capstone
months.focus: Full analysis from question → data → model → recommendation, with quantified business impact.

quant.name: Quant / Alt-Data
quant.summary: The differentiator for D.E. Shaw Alt-Data and Woodline: alt-data sourcing → factor research → backtesting → portfolio/risk → research platform. Builds directly on the quant-research background.

months.title: Markets & Returns Foundations
months.focus: Returns, market microstructure, data sources, factor zoo overview, look-ahead/survivorship awareness.

months.title: Alt-Data Sourcing
months.focus: Web/satellite/transaction data, scraping pipelines, entity resolution, data cleaning at scale.

months.title: Factor Research
months.focus: Signal construction, information coefficient (IC), decay, neutralization, cross-sectional ranking.

months.title: Backtesting Framework
months.focus: Build a backtester from scratch. Handle look-ahead, survivorship, point-in-time data, realistic fills.

months.title: Portfolio Construction
months.focus: Mean-variance, risk models, constraints, optimization, factor exposure targeting.

months.title: Sector & Fundamental Modeling
months.focus: Model company/sector KPIs, fundamental factors, earnings dynamics — the Woodline core skill.

months.title: Cross-Sectional & TS Signals
months.focus: Combine multiple signals, time-series vs cross-sectional, signal blending, regime awareness.

months.title: Statistical Arbitrage
months.focus: Pairs trading, cointegration, mean reversion, hedging, capacity considerations.

months.title: Risk Management
months.focus: VaR, drawdown control, position sizing, factor risk decomposition, stress testing.

months.title: Transaction Costs & Execution
months.focus: Slippage, market impact models, turnover control, net-of-cost signal evaluation.

months.title: Quant Research Platform
months.focus: Reproducible research pipeline: data → signal → backtest → report, versioned and automated.

months.title: Alt-Data Signal Capstone
months.focus: End-to-end: source an alt-data signal, research it, backtest net-of-cost, write the research note.

day_of_week.Monday: Set weekly goals per track, review last week's deliverables
day_of_week.Friday: Write 500+ words technical content, review the week
day_of_week.Sunday: Review notes, plan next week, update GitHub

coverage_legend.built: Implemented or applied end-to-end at least once
coverage_legend.interview-ready: Can explain and reproduce under interview pressure
